name: The assignment operator shall be optimized for self-assignments
If stack capacity is exceeded the push method shall fail.
Emplacing element at a position greater than capacity shall fail
Emplacing element at a position greater than the current size shall fail
Emplacing element at the position exceeding capacity should fail
Emplacing an element at a position in the middle of existing elements shall move all elements from the position to the right
It shall be possible to emplace the number of elements equal to the vector capacity
It shall be possible to emplace a single element to an empty vector with capacity greater than zero
